channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: As America 250 approaches, fewer Americans view their country as exceptional, AP-NORC poll finds
Security increased at Madison Square Garden as Trump attends NBA Finals
item.description: With President Donald Trump expected at Game 3 of the NBA Finals, NYPD and Secret Service are tightening security at Madison Square Garden.

item.title: Chase lights up New York City for the NBA Finals
item.description: As the Knicks return for Game 3, sponsor Chase celebrates with fan experiences and blue-and-orange displays across the city.

item.title: 6.1 magnitude earthquake near Cuba felt across Florida
item.description: A 6.1-magnitude earthquake struck in the Gulf, about 118 kilometers west northwest of Cuba.
